description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with exaggeratedly elongated limbs and torso, giving it a surreal, stretched appearance. The figure is dressed in a fitted top and pants with a prominent vertical stripe running down the side, and is wearing sneakers. The skin is visible on the hands and lower legs, while the rest of the body is covered by clothing. The posture suggests the person is either walking or in a dynamic stride, with one leg extended far forward and the other trailing behind. The head is not visible, as it is obscured by the extreme elongation of the upper body. The overall form is highly stylized and abstract, deviating significantly from natural human proportions.
description: A highly stylized adult pedestrian with extremely elongated limbs and torso, dressed in fitted clothing and sneakers, depicted in a dynamic walking pose.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from the back, showing the elongated torso and both legs, with the feet and sneakers visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: A side view highlights the extreme length of the torso and one leg extended forward, with the sneaker and foot clearly visible.
description_view_2: A top-down view emphasizes the stretched body and the alignment of the limbs, with the sneakers peeking out at the bottom.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the other leg extended, again highlighting the surreal proportions and the dynamic stride.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear with fitted top and pants featuring a vertical stripe
